languages.text: {n}Из горла мертвеца доносится несколько щелчков.{/n} "Процесс импрегнации завершен досрочно, схема нарушена". {n}Мертвец умолкает на несколько секунд.{/n} "Впрочем, это еще не конец. Скажи мне, особь, какова твоя функция".

traits.locale_text: {n}Из горла мертвеца доносится несколько щелчков.{/n} "Процесс инпрегнации завершен досрочно, схема нарушена". {n}Мертвец умолкает на несколько секунд.{/n} "Впрочем, это еще не конец. Скажи мне, особь, какова твоя функция".

{n}Из горла мертвеца доносится несколько щелчков.{/n} "Процесс импрегнации завершен досрочно, схема нарушена". {n}Мертвец умолкает на несколько секунд.{/n} "Впрочем, это еще не конец. Скажи мне, особь, какова твоя функция".

languages.text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

{n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}Aus der Kehle des Toten ertönen mehrere Klickgeräusche.{/n} "Der Injektionsvorgang wurde vorzeitig abgebrochen und damit die Prozedur unterbrochen." {n}Der Leichnam verstummt für einige Augenblicke.{/n} "Doch das ist noch nicht das Ende. Sagen Sie mir, welche Funktion Sie haben, Exemplar."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}La gorge du mort émet plusieurs clics.{/n} "Le processus d'injection a été interrompu prématurément, ce qui a interrompu la procédure." {n}Le cadavre reste silencieux quelques instants.{/n} "Cependant, ce n'est pas encore la fin. Dites-moi quelle est votre fonction, spécimen."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}死者的喉咙发出几声咔嗒声。{/n}"注射过程提前结束，因此中断了程序"{n}尸体沉默了片刻。{/n}"然而，这还不是结束。告诉我你的指定功能，标本。"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}La garganta del muerto produce varios chasquidos.{/n} "El proceso de inyección se ha interrumpido prematuramente". {n}El cadáver guarda silencio unos instantes.{/n} "Sin embargo, este no es el final todavía. Dime tu función designada, espécimen".
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}死者の喉が何度かカチッと音を立てる。{/n}「注射が途中で打ち切られ、処置が中断された。{n}死体はしばらくの間沈黙する。{/n}「しかし、これで終わりではない。あなたの機能を教えてください。
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's throat produces several clicks.{/n} "The injection process was terminated prematurely, thus interrupting the procedure." {n}The corpse falls silent for a few moments.{/n} "However, this is not the end just yet. Tell me your designated function, specimen."

languages.text: {n}Ölü adamın boğazından birkaç tıkırtı geliyor.{/n} "Enjeksiyon işlemi zamanından önce sonlandırıldı, dolayısıyla prosedür yarıda kesildi." {n}Ceset birkaç dakika sessiz kalır.{/n} "Ancak, bu henüz bir son değil. Bana belirlenmiş işlevini söyle, numune."
